jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Boat
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Boat! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Boat:
Boat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat!
